steps.title: Identify the required comparison
steps.content: The question states the student wants to compare the hardness of talc and orthoclase. This is the decisive signal: the answer must make this specific comparison using relevant information from the notes.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly compares orthoclase and talc, stating that orthoclase can scratch talc and is therefore harder—applying the key principle from the notes. Choices A, C, and D either describe the scale generally or compare different mineral pairs. This matches choice B — B is correct.
